signals.headline: Deutsche Börse $200M Kraken Investment Confirmed | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Deutsche Börse $200M Kraken Investment Confirmed | YES | HIGH confidence**  
Deutsche Börse's landmark $200 million investment in Kraken, a major crypto exchange, has been confirmed as a key development signaling traditional finance's maturing embrace of crypto infrastructure, coinciding with Bitcoin consolidating above $73,000 and whale accumulation (wallets >10,000 BTC seeing net inflows for the
